derived_hf_user_bucket_artifact.notes: Optional user-facing shortcut for exporting selected reviewer histories without re-streaming raw category files.

notes: Use scripts/fetch_amazon_reviews_2023.py for category-scoped sampling, optional metadata retrieval, full raw downloads, and reviewer-level history construction. Use scripts/export_hf_amazon_user_histories.py when starting from the derived HF user-bucket artifact.
